title: How To Auto Dub Your Content On Youtube!

transcript.text: YouTube has a feature called auto dubbing. Let me show you how to turn it on. Since you're already logged into the studio, click settings in the left menu bar, then channel, and go to advanced settings. Scroll down and check the box that says allow automatic dubbing. It's as simple as that. Is the dubbing perfect? No. The voice isn't yours and occasionally the sync isn't flawless either. But, viewers in those markets are not comparing it to a native speaker. They're comparing it to nothing because before this feature existed, they simply couldn't access your content at all. And the reality is, like all AI at the moment, this tool is going to get better and better. And critically, it is free.
